title: Bemos
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Bemos |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him''[[Specter of the Past]]'' |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Imperial Remnant]] **[[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You must be joking, Admiral Pellaeon.''"
"''I agree. We are the Empire, Admiral. The Empire does not surrender|Moffs Andray and Bemos, to Supreme Commander Gillad Pellaeon|}} '''Bemos''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] on the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. he attended a meeting with the Council and Imperial [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. After Pellaeon suggested signing a peace treaty with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Moff [[Andray]] and Bemos believed the supreme commander was joking. The latter claimed that the Empire did not surrender and thought that the Empire did not have to do anything, as he believed that the conflicts in the New Republic would lead to the government's destruction. After an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]], the meeting was over, and Bemos and the other Moffs agreed to surrender, giving their credentials to Pellaeon. Eventually, the supreme commander signed a [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace treaty]] with the Republic.''[[Vision of the Future]]'' During the meeting on Bastion, Moff Bemos wore a large [[codoran ring]] on his finger. ==Behind the scenes== Bemos appeared in the [[1997]] novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', the first installment of [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Moffs19ABY}} {{Interlang |de=Bemos }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Moff Council members]] [[Category:Moffs of the Imperial Remnant]]
